---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Reverb
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what are you trying to do? A clear description of
the use case helps.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches an adapter (library / search /
downloader), say which.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to how other apps do it, etc.
